work_summary.title: A-FORGE Intelligence Machine Alignment
work_summary.description: Alignment of Gemini CLI commands and skills with the A-FORGE Planner/Executor/Verifier triad architecture.

F1_Amanah.evidence: Commands namespaced to avoid global conflict; skills externalized to .gemini/skills/

F2_Truth.evidence: Skill definitions match A-FORGE README.md specifications

F3_TriWitness.evidence: User request + AI execution + System validation

critical_fixes: Resolved Gemini CLI command conflicts (/vps, /forge, /trinity) by namespacing to /a:
Initialized .gemini/skills/ directory with 10 canonical A-FORGE skills
Aligned skill prompts with Planner/Executor/Verifier triad
